property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If "Earth Dragon Ball 3" is in play this attack cannot be stopped.

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose an opponent and reduce his Main Personality 1 personality level if possible.

property.name: Text
property.value: Reduce a villain 1 personality level if possible. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 life cards of damage. Costs 2 power stages to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Energy attack. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. You may have up to 8 copies of this card in your Life Deck. Physical attack. If successful, gain 4 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. You may have up to 8 copies of this card in your Life Deck. Physical attack doing +2 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. You may have up to 8 copies of this card in your Life Deck. Stops a physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also stop all opponent's physical attacks for the remainder of Combat. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: When you perform an energy attack, you may choose for it to do the same amount of power stages of damage to any personality instead of dealing life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, you may remove one of the defender's Drills in play from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. Your Main Personality gains 3 power stages. Remove the top card in your opponent's discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical Attack doing +4 power stages of damage. Costs 1 power stage to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an opponent's physical or energy attack. Costs 1 power stage to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical ttack doing +2 power stages of damage. Remove the top 3 cards in your opponent's discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an opponent's physical attack. Your Main Personality gains 3 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical ttack doing 3 life cards of damage. If successful, your opponent cannot perform physical attacks for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +6 power stages of damage. You may not perform any physical attacks for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Play this card during your defender defends phase. Choose one - For the remainder of combat all attacks performed against you do either 2 less power stages of damage, or 2 less life cards of damage. Raise your anger 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Discard your hand to stop a physical or energy attack. You must have at least one card in your hand to use this Drill.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. Raise any personality to their highest power stage. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw cards until you have 3 cards in your hand. Place the top 2 cards in your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose an ally from your discard pile and put it into play at 2 power stages above 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 7 life cards of damage. If successful, also raise your anger 1 level and you may not perform any more energy attacks for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Place an opponent's ally at the bottom of their Life Deck. If "Earth Dragon Ball 4" is in play you may place 2 allies instead of 1.

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose one opponent. That opponent cannot gain their power stages until the beginning of your next turn. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: No Dragon Balls can be played while this Drill is in play. Limit one per deck. This card is not considered a Black fighting style card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 7 power stages of damage. Remove from the game after use. Unless your Main Personality is Garlic Jr., limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, also lower an opponent's anger 2 levels. Of "Earth Dragon Ball 5" is in play, the attack cannot be stopped.

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose one of your opponent's allies and remove it from the game. If that ally is removed from the game, raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: To lower an opponent's anger 3 levels choose one of your opponent's allies in play and place it at the bottom of his Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage. If Gohan is anywhere in play, it does 6 power stages of damage instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, also lower an opponent's anger level to 0. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when your opponent's anger level reaches 5 or more to set their anger level to 3 instead of gaining a personality level. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. When you have 10 or less life cards in your Life Deck, shuffle up to 7 cards from the top of your discard pile back into your Life Deck. Limit one per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your Life Deck for one card, set it aside face-down, and place it in your hand at the beginning of your opponent's next turn. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise any ally to its highest power stage. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Cards that end Combat may not be played or used while this drill is in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, Combat ends after damage is dealt. Remove from the game after use. If Saibaimen are anywhere in play, discard this card instead of removing it from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your opponent may only defend for the remainder of Combat. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 life cards of damage. If Chiaotzu is anywhere in play it does +3 life cards of damage instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. Raise your anger 2 levels. If "Earth Dragon Ball 6" is in play raise your anger 3 levels instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 2 power stages of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +2 life cards of damage. If "Earth Dragon Ball 7" is in play is does +4 life cards of damage instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If "Vegeta's Quickness Drill" is anywhere in play the attack does 7 life cards of damage instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Saiyan Heritage only. Physical attack. If successful, your opponent discards a card at random from his hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Any villain personality gains 5 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. Remove one of your allies from the game to raise your anger 2 levels. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 life cards of damage. Raise your anger 1 level. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Costs 3 power stages to perform. Raise your anger 2 levels. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. You may do +2 power stages of damage with all physical attacks.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also remove an ally of your choice from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also raise you anger 1 level for every "Frieza's Irritation Grows" in your discard pile.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Lower an opponents' anger 1 level. If "Saiyan Power Drill" is anywhere in play lower their anger 2 levels instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Use immediately after you take damage from one of your opponent's attacks. When your Main Personality takes life cards of damage, your opponent discards twice as many life cards. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise your Main Personality's Power Up Rating (PUR) by 1 while this Drill is in play. Do +1 power stage of damage with every physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: After every successful energy attack you perform, you may discard a card from your hand and shuffle it into your Life Deck, and then draw a card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise any villain Main Personality to its highest power stage. Set all of his allies to five power stages above 0. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage. This card stays in play to be used one more time this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose "Namek Dragon Ball 1" or "Namek Dragon Ball 2" from your Life Deck and put it into play. This Dragon Ball loses its power for the remainder of the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose "Namek Dragon Ball 2" or "Namek Dragon Ball 3" from your Life Deck and put it into play. This Dragon Ball loses its power for the remainder of the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Physical attack. If successful also capture a Dragon Ball from your opponent. Lower your opponent's anger 2 levels. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also remove 1 of your opponent's Drills in play from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also choose and remove one Non-Combat/non-Dragon Ball card in play from the game. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 1 life card of damage for each of the attacking personality's power stages above 0. Costs 3 power stags to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops an energy attack. During your next attack phace, either pass or this card allows your Main Personality to perform an energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, when a successful energy attack is performed against you, you may perform the same energy attack during your next attack phase.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. If successful, also stops an opponent from performing any energy attack for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 4 power stages of damage. Costs 2 power stages to perform. If successful, also gain 4 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: You may play an energy attack from your hand and pay its costs in order to stop an energy attack, and then your opponent discards 1 life card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. This attack cannot be stopped or prevented by Physical Combat cards. Raise your anger 1 level. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, you may discard all of the defender's allies or Drills in play instead of dealing damage. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Remove one of the defender's allies or Drills in play from the game. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +3 power stages of damage. Costs 4 power stages to perform. Raise your anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw up to 3 cards from the bottom of your discard pile into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Discard all opponents' Non-Combat/non-Dragon Ball cards in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also lower your opponent's anger 3 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also gain 5 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 life cards of damage. If successful, also remove any opponent's allu in play from the game. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the effects of any Combat card. Use when needed.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, a player may choose to have a "Straining Move" card he performs unable to be stopped or prevented. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the defender, your Main Personality gains 2 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. Raise your anger 1 level. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also remove the top 2 cards in your opponent's discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, also choose a card from your discard pile and place it on top of your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when entering Combat. Search your discard pile for any one Combat, Physical Combat, or Energy Combat card, show your opponent, and place it in your hand. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack or stops a physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops all "Constant Combat Powers" from working for the remainder of this Combat. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise your Main Personality to his highest power stage. Raise your opponent's Main Personality to his highest power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Lower an opponent's anger 2 levels and reduce their power stages by 2.

property.name: Text
property.value: Lower an opponent's anger 2 levels and place the top 3 cards of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: This card ends Combat and both players skip the Discard step at the end of this turn. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 5 power stages of damage or 3 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops a physical attack. In your next attack phase, perform the exact same attack that this card stopped.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When defending in Combat after taking life cards of damage from an energy attack, place the top card of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Allies' physical attacks and their personality powers have no effect on Garlic Jr. in Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Do +1 life card of damage with every successful physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: After every successful energy attack you perform, put the bottom card from your discard pile on the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: If Jeice makes 2 successful energy attacks in a single Combat, at the end of Combat you may search your Life Deck for an ally and put it into play at 3 power stages above 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: After Jeice performs a successful physical attack, Jeice does not have to be at 0 power stages or one power stage above 0 to have an ally use their power.

property.name: Text
property.value: Defense Shield: Stops the first unstopped energy attack in Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When defending against a physical attack, choose any personality in play and use that power stage to determine damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also stop all opponent's physical attacks for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also stop all your opponent's energy attacks for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Does 1 life card of damage if it is stopped.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Do +1 power stage of damage and +2 life cards of damage with every successful attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Remove all copies of "Guru Fades" in all player's Life Decks and discard piles from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise your anger 2 levels or lower an opponent's anger 2 levels.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also capture any Namek Dragon Ball from your opponent. Limit 2 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Remove all Namek Dragon Balls in play and in all Life Decks from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Capture an opponent's Dragon Ball. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the defender, search your Life Deck for an ally and put it into play at its highest power stage. This ally takes control of this Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Name a Non-Combat/non-Dragon Ball card. Search your Life Deck for a copy of that card and put it into play. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose an opponent's Dragon Ball in play and shuffle it back into his Life Deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: All players remove all cards in their discard pile from the game. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Place all opponent's allies at the bottom of their Life Decks. Raise any personality to its highest power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Discard all opponents' Drills in play. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: At the beginning of each player's next turn, that player searches his discard pile for all allies and puts them into his hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Remove up to two of your opponent's Non-Combat cards in play from the game. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: You may use this card when your opponent would win by the Most Powerful Personality Victory. Lower any opponent's Main Personality that is level 2 or higher by 1 personality level. Using this card effect can keep your opponent from winning with the Most Powerful Personality victory. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 7 power stages of damage. Your opponent cannot take life cards of damage from this attack. Lower opponent's anger to 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Choose an opponent. This opponent may not play any allies while this Drill is in play. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Discard 2 cards from your hand, then search your Life Deck for 2 Combat cards, show them to your opponent, and place them in your hand. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. This attack cannot be stopped or prevented. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful also search your discard pile and Life Deck for any ally and put it into play at 6 power stages above 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use at the beginning of your Combat Step. For the remainder of Combat all of your physical atacks do +1 power stage if damage for every Namek Dragon Ball in play. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Put the top 2 cards of your discard pile at the bottom fo your Life Deck. Take the top 2 cards of your opponent's discard pile and remove them from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. For the remainder of this Combat all successful physical attacks performed by your Main Personality do +3 power stages of damage. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Ends a Combat. Choose any 3 cards from your discard pile and shuffle them back into your Life Deck. Remove from the game after use. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Raise your Main Personality to his highest power stage. Raise your anger 1 level. Place the top 2 cards of your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Namekian Heritage only. After receiving damage from a successful attack performed against you, your Main Personality gains 1 power stage for every life card of damage you received.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, after you perform a successful energy attack, search through the defender's Life Deck for any card and discard it.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. This attack does +1 life card of damage for each ally that you have in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: You may now keep up to 2 cards in your hand at the end of each turn.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. When you perform this attack pay any amount of power stages from your Main Personality. For each power stage paid, do +1 power stage of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: When this Drill comes into play, choose an opponent. While this Drill is in play, all energy attacks cost +1 power stage for this opponent to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your Main Personality pays 5 power stages to discard all allies and Non-Combat/non-Dragon Ball cards from play. Lower your Main Personality's power stages to 0. Raise your anger 1 level. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Once per Combat, in place of an attack, you may remove the top card in your discard pile from the game to raise your anger 1 level. If it is a Red Style card raise your anger 2 levels instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: All of your successful attacks do +1 life card and +1 power stage of damage. Black Style attacks do +2 life cards and +2 power stages of damage instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: All energy attacks performed by your Main Personality do +1 life card of damage if successful, or cost 1 less power stage to perform to a minimum of 1. Orange Style energy attacks do +1 life card of damage if successful and cost 1 less power stage to perform to a minimum of 1 instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering any Combat, you may draw the bottom card from your discard pile into your hand. If that card is a Namekian Style card, raisr your Main Personality to its highest power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Draw a card when entering any Combat. If that card is a Saiyan Style card, you may show it to your opponent and your opponent's main personality loses 4 power stages to a minimum of 0.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your opponent must now reach 6 anger to gain a personality level. All successful Blue Style attacks also lower your opponent's anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: During your opponent's turn, all damage (power stages and life cards) from physical attacks performed against your Trunks, the Hero is reduced to 1 power stage of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: During your opponent's turn, all damage (power stages and life cards) from physical attacks performed against your Vegeta, Saiyan Prince is reduced to 1 power stage of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: When defending in Combat, you may also draw the bottom card of your discard pile into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When Nail or Dende are anywhere in play, all of your physical attacks do +3 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. Lower your opponent's anger 1 level. Raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Destructo-Disk Energy attack doing 5 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. When determining damage for this attack, treat Krilling as if he were at 350,000.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use this card just as an opponent wins by any means. The victory is postponed until the start of his next turn. Check for the victory conditions at that time. Limit 1 per deck. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Play this as your first attack card in Combat. Energy attack doing 10 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All your energy attacks do 2 life cards of damage when they are stopped.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack. If successful, also lower opponent's anger 2 levels and raise your anger 1 level.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Frieza does +1 power stage and +1 life card of damage with every energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Frieza does +2 power stages of damage with every physical attack and +2 life cards of damage with every energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Frieza does +2 power stages and +2 life cards of damage with every attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: At the end of combat this turn, if you've taken no life cards of damage during this combat, you may search your Life Deck for an ally and put it into play at 3 power stages above 0, you may only use this power on your opponents turn (This must be activated in your Attackers Attacks phase).

property.name: Text
property.value: Power: Raise your anger 2 at the end of combat this turn if you've taken 5 or more life cards of damage while Goku, the Defender is in play this turn (This must be activated in your Attackers Attacks Phase and only counts life cards of damage taken on this level).

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Defense Shield: Stop the first unstopped energy attack in Combat. You cannot have your anger lowered more than 1 level from any card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also capture a Dragon Ball.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your opponent loses 2 power stages whenever he stops a physical attack you perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +4 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Defense Shield: When defending in Combat, stop the first unstopped attack performed on you.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When defending in Combat, raise your anger 1 level after Gohan receives damage from an energy attack performed against him.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When defending in Combat, raise your anger 1 level after Vegeta receives damage from a physical attack performed against him.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 8 power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 7 life cards of damage. Costs no power stages to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All damage from energy attacks performed against Garlic Jr. is reduced by 2 life cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All damage from energy attacks performed against Garlic Jr. is reduced by 3 life cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All damage from energy attacks performed against Garlic Jr. is reduced to 1 life card.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When defending in Combat, your opponent must play with his hand face-up on the table.

property.name: Text
property.value: Kamino Bashi Waza Physical attack. If successful, also stop all opponent's physical attacks for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 8 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: When receiving damage from a successful energy attack, gain 2 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Gain 1 power stage after every successful physical attack you perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. This must be your first attack in Combat. Your opponent must play/use 2 cards/effects that stop physical attacks in order to stop this attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: All of your physical attacks do +2 Power stages of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat, as a defender, choose and discard 1 card at random from your opponent's hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the defender, choose 1 card at random from your opponent's hand and place it at the top of his Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Choose any personality in play. You may use that personality's power stage when determining damage from a physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: After receiving damage from an energy attack, you may draw the bottom card from your discard pil and put it in your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Each successful physical attack forces your opponent to remove the top card in their discard pile from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: If Goku takes no damage while defending in Combat, you may raise him to his highest power stage at the end of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 6 life cards of damage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Do +2 life cards of damage with every successful energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Each successful physical attack you perform allows you to place the top card in your discard pile at the bottom of your Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: When entering Combat as the defender, you may also draw the bottom card from your discard pile into your hand.

property.name: Text
property.value: Energy attack doing 6 life cards of damage. Costs no power stages to perform.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Do +1 power stage of damage with every successful energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Reduce an opponent's anger by 1 level every time he performs a successful energy attack on you.

property.name: Text
property.value: Constant Combat Power: Your anger cannot be reduced.

property.name: Text
property.value: Discard 2 life cards to stop an energy attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: After a successful energy attack is performed against you, raise any one of your Personalities in play to its highest power stage.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, also gain 4 power stages.

property.name: Text
property.value: Your opponent may not perform physical attacks for the remainder of Combat. Limit 1 per deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Allies cannot be used for the remainder of Combat.

property.name: Text
property.value: Search your Life Deck for up to 2 Trunks Named cards and put them in your hand. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Stops the first 3 power stages or life cards of damage from any physical attack.

property.name: Text
property.value: Heroes only. Look at your opponent's hand, choose 1 card and shuffle that card back into their Life Deck.

property.name: Text
property.value: Whenever you put cards on the bottom of your Life Deck, you may shuffle them back into your Life Deck instead.

property.name: Text
property.value: Cards that end Combat may not be played or used while this Drill is in play.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing +5 power stages of damage. Remove from the game after use.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack. If successful, remove any Drill in play from the game.

property.name: Text
property.value: Discard an opponent's ally of your choice.

property.name: Text
property.value: Physical attack doing 4 life cards of damage. If this attack is stopped, your opponent discards 2 life cards.

property.name: Text
property.value: Villains only. Look at the top 5 cards of your opponent's Life Deck and put them back in any order.

property.name: Text
property.value: Use when entering any Combat, Drills, Allies, and personality powers may not be used this Combat.
